name: mitable
description: Mitable AI Onboarding Buddy - Intelligent desktop assistant for contextual employee onboarding

scripts.dev:instance1: PORT=3000 VITE_PORT=5173 BACKEND_PORT=3000 VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:3000 turbo run dev
scripts.dev:instance2: PORT=3001 VITE_PORT=5174 BACKEND_PORT=3001 VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:3001 turbo run dev
scripts.dev:instance3: PORT=3002 VITE_PORT=5175 BACKEND_PORT=3002 VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:3002 turbo run dev
scripts.dev:instance1:admin: PORT=3000 VITE_PORT=5173 BACKEND_PORT=3000 VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:3000 concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=apps/backend" "npm run dev:admin --workspace=apps/electron"
scripts.dev:instance2:admin: PORT=3001 VITE_PORT=5174 BACKEND_PORT=3001 VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:3001 concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=apps/backend" "npm run dev:admin --workspace=apps/electron"
scripts.dev:instance3:admin: PORT=3002 VITE_PORT=5175 BACKEND_PORT=3002 VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:3002 concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=apps/backend" "npm run dev:admin --workspace=apps/electron"
scripts.ci: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test && npm run build
